dashboard.label: Wellness
dashboard.description: Vendor-neutral vitals (SpO2, temperature, HRV, respiration) and recovery (readiness, resilience, sleep-time) — Wearables data model
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Wellness","description":"SpO2, body temperature, HRV and sleep timing trends","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-14d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"},"input_person":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Person (temp)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_person_list"},"options":{"token":"person","defaultValue":"*","items":[{"label":"All people","value":"*"}]},"encoding":{"value":"primary.person_id","label":"primary.person_name"}},"input_units":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Units","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_units_opts"},"options":{"token":"units","defaultValue":"metric","selectFirstSearchResult":true},"encoding":{"value":"primary.units","label":"primary.units"}}},"dataSources":{"ds_spo2_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=spo2 person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval spo2_avg=round(spo2_avg,1), spo2color=case(spo2_avg>=95,"#4CAF50",spo2_avg>=90,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A")
| table spo2_avg, spo2color","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"SpO2 — latest"},"ds_temp_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval temp_deviation=round(temp_deviation,2), temp_trend_deviation=round(temp_trend_deviation,2)
| table temp_deviation, temp_trend_deviation","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"ds_temp_latest"},"ds_hrv_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval hrv_bal=round(hrv_balance,0)
| table hrv_bal","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"HRV balance — latest"},"ds_breath_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_sleep sleep_type=long_sleep person_id="$person$"
| dedup day sortby -total_sleep_min
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval avg_breath=round(respiration_avg,1)
| table avg_breath","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Breath rate — latest"},"ds_spo2_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=spo2 person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| eval spo2_avg=round(spo2_avg,2)
| timechart span=1d@d avg(spo2_avg) as "SpO2 %""},"name":"SpO2 trend"},"ds_temp_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| eval temp_dev=round(temp_deviation*if("$units$"=="imperial",1.8,1),2)
| timechart span=1d@d avg(temp_dev) as "Temp Deviation""},"name":"ds_temp_trend"},"ds_hrv_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| eval hrv=round(hrv_balance,0)
| timechart span=1d@d avg(hrv) as "HRV Balance""},"name":"HRV balance trend"},"ds_readiness_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| timechart span=1d@d avg(readiness_score) as Readiness"},"name":"Readiness score trend"},"ds_sleep_time":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=sleep_time person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| where isnotnull(sleep_time_recommendation) AND sleep_time_recommendation!="null"
| sort -_time
| head 7
| eval recommendation=replace(sleep_time_recommendation,"_"," "), status=replace(sleep_time_status,"_"," ")
| table day, recommendation, status","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-14d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep time recommendations"},"ds_readiness_contributors_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| timechart span=1d@d avg(readiness_contrib_body_temp) as "Body Temp", avg(hrv_balance) as "HRV Balance", avg(readiness_contrib_resting_hr) as "Resting HR", avg(readiness_contrib_recovery_index) as "Recovery""},"name":"Readiness contributors trend"},"ds_resilience_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=resilience person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval Level=upper(substr(resilience_level,1,1)).substr(resilience_level,2), rcolor=case(resilience_level="limited","#E8503A",resilience_level="adequate","#E8843A",resilience_level="solid","#F4A422",resilience_level="strong","#4CAF50",resilience_level="exceptional","#4CAF50",true(),"#8a93a0")
| table Level, rcolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-45d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Resilience level — latest"},"ds_resilience_contrib":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=resilience person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval "Sleep Recovery"=round(resilience_contrib_sleep_recovery,0), "Daytime Recovery"=round(resilience_contrib_daytime_recovery,0), "Stress"=round(resilience_contrib_stress,0)
| table "Sleep Recovery","Daytime Recovery","Stress"
| transpose
| rename column as contributor, "row 1" as score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-45d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Resilience contributors"},"ds_resilience_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=resilience person_id="$person$"
| dedup day
| timechart span=1d@d latest(resilience_contrib_sleep_recovery) as "Sleep Recovery", latest(resilience_contrib_daytime_recovery) as "Daytime Recovery", latest(resilience_contrib_stress) as "Stress"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Resilience contributors trend"},"ds_person_list":{"type":"ds.search","name":"People for the picker (registry)","options":{"query":"| inputlookup wearable_person_profile
| eval person_name=coalesce(person_name, person_id)
| sort person_name
| table person_id person_name"}},"ds_garmin_bb_latest":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Garmin — Body Battery (latest)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily vendor=garmin body_battery=* person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval body_battery=round(body_battery), bbcolor=case(body_battery>=75,"#4CAF50",body_battery>=40,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A")
| table body_battery, bbcolor"}},"ds_garmin_stress_latest":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Garmin — Stress (latest)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily vendor=garmin stress_avg=* person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval stress_avg=round(stress_avg), stresscolor=case(stress_avg<=25,"#4CAF50",stress_avg<=50,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A")
| table stress_avg, stresscolor"}},"ds_garmin_vo2_latest":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Garmin — VO2 Max (latest)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily vendor=garmin vo2max=* person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval vo2max=round(vo2max,1)
| table vo2max"}},"ds_garmin_fitage_latest":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Garmin — Fitness Age (latest)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily vendor=garmin fitness_age=* person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| table fitness_age"}},"ds_garmin_trend":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Garmin — Body Battery & Stress (trend)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily vendor=garmin person_id="$person$"
| timechart span=1d avg(body_battery) as "Body Battery" avg(stress_avg) as "Stress""}},"ds_garmin_absent":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Garmin — absent detector (row only when no Garmin data)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily person_id="$person$"
| stats count(eval(vendor=="garmin")) as g
| where g=0
| eval msg="No Garmin device connected"
| table msg"}},"ds_oura_absent":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Oura — absent detector (row only when no Oura data)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"-30d","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily person_id="$person$"
| stats count(eval(vendor=="oura")) as o
| where o=0
| eval msg="No Oura ring connected"
| table msg"}},"ds_bc_weight":{"type":"ds.search","name":"ds_bc_weight","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"0","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily weight_kg=* person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval u_weight=if("$units$"=="imperial","lb","kg"), weight_disp=if("$units$"=="imperial", round(weight_kg*2.20462,1), round(weight_kg,1))
| table weight_disp, u_weight"}},"ds_bc_bmi":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Body Comp — BMI (device or computed from height_cm)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"0","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily weight_kg=* person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| lookup wearable_person_profile person_id OUTPUT height_cm
| eval bmi=coalesce(bmi, round(weight_kg/pow(height_cm/100,2),1))
| table bmi"}},"ds_bc_fat":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Body Comp — body fat % (latest)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"0","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily body_fat_pct=* person_id="$person$"
| sort -_time
| head 1
| eval body_fat_pct=round(body_fat_pct,1)
| table body_fat_pct"}},"ds_bc_source":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Body Comp — source vendor(s)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"0","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily weight_kg=* person_id="$person$"
| stats values(vendor) as src
| eval src=mvjoin(src, ", ")
| table src"}},"ds_bc_trend":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Body Comp — weight trend (units-aware)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily weight_kg=* person_id="$person$"
| eval w=if("$units$"=="imperial", round(weight_kg*2.20462,1), round(weight_kg,1))
| timechart span=1d avg(w) as Weight
| eventstats max(Weight) as Max, min(Weight) as Min"}},"ds_bc_absent":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Body Comp — absent detector","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"0","latest":"now"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily person_id="$person$"
| stats count(weight_kg) as w
| where w=0
| eval msg="No body-composition data"
| table msg"}},"ds_units_opts":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Units options (person pref first)","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"0","latest":"now"},"query":"| makeresults
| eval person_id="$person$"
| lookup wearable_person_profile person_id OUTPUT units as pref
| eval pref=coalesce(pref,"metric")
| eval other=if(pref=="imperial","metric","imperial")
| eval units=mvappend(pref,other)
| mvexpand units
| table units"}},"ds_bc_bf_bmi":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Body fat % + BMI trend","options":{"queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"},"query":"`widx` tag=wearable_daily person_id="$person$"
| lookup wearable_person_profile person_id OUTPUT height_cm
| eval bmi=coalesce(bmi, round(weight_kg/pow(height_cm/100,2),1))
| timechart span=1d avg(body_fat_pct) as "Body Fat %" avg(bmi) as "BMI""}}},"visualizations":{"spo2_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_spo2_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"spo2_avg","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2color') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":72,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2_avg')","label":"SpO2","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":"%","unitPosition":"after","align":"left"},"title":"Blood Oxygen (SpO2)","hideWhenNoData":true},"hrv_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hrv_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"hrv_bal","majorColor":"#A78BFA","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hrv_bal')","label":"HRV Balance","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"HRV Balance Score","hideWhenNoData":true},"breath_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_breath_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_breath","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_breath')","label":"Avg Breath","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" rpm","unitPosition":"after","align":"left"},"title":"Avg Breath Rate","hideWhenNoData":true},"spo2_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"SpO2 Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_spo2_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":90,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"SpO2 %"},"hideWhenNoData":true},"temp_trend_line":{"type":"splunk.area","title":"Skin Temperature Deviation Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Deviation"},"hideWhenNoData":true},"hrv_trend_line":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"HRV Balance Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hrv_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#A78BFA"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"HRV Balance Score"},"hideWhenNoData":true},"readiness_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Readiness Score Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"},"hideWhenNoData":true},"recovery_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Readiness Contributors Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness_contributors_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50","#A78BFA","#E8503A","#F4A422"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"},"hideWhenNoData":true},"sleep_time_table":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Sleep Time Recommendations (Last 7 Days)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_time"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","headerBackgroundColor":"#2D3250","rowBackgroundColors":"> table | seriesByIndex(0) | pick(tableAltRowBackgroundColorsByBackgroundColor)","tableAltRowBackgroundColorsByBackgroundColor":[{"value":"#1A1D2E","to":"#232640"}]},"hideWhenNoData":true},"resilience_level_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"Level","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('rcolor') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":36,"label":"Resilience","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> primary | seriesByName('Level') | lastPoint()","align":"left"},"title":"Resilience","hideWhenNoData":true},"resilience_contrib_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_contrib"},"options":{"xAxisField":"contributor","seriesColors":["#8B7FB0"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Resilience Contributors","hideWhenNoData":true},"resilience_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#7B56DB","#009CEB","#DD9900"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Score"},"title":"Resilience Contributors Trend","hideWhenNoData":true},"vitals_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","markdown":"### About these vitals
- **Blood Oxygen (SpO2)** — % oxygen in your blood overnight; ~95–100% is typical.
- **Skin Temp Deviation** — how far last night's skin temperature sat from your baseline (°C); large swings can flag illness or cycle changes.
- **HRV Balance** — heart-rate variability vs your baseline; steady/high = well recovered.
- **Avg Breath Rate** — average breaths per minute during sleep.

**Learn more:** [your device — Readiness Contributors](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360057791533-Readiness-Contributors)"}},"recovery_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","markdown":"### About recovery
- **Readiness Score** — your device's daily estimate of how recovered you are (0–100).
- **Readiness Contributors** — signals your device blends into readiness (body temp, HRV balance, resting HR, recovery index).
- **Resilience** — longer-term capacity to handle stress (limited → exceptional), from recovery + stress balance.
- **Sleep Time Recommendations** — your device's suggested bedtime window and whether you followed it.

**Learn more:** [your device — Readiness](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360025589793-Readiness-Score) · [Resilience](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/25358829055251-Resilience)"}},"garmin_bb_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_garmin_bb_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"body_battery","majorFontSize":72,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showLabel":false,"trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('bbcolor') | lastPoint()"},"title":"Body Battery","hideWhenNoData":true},"garmin_stress_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_garmin_stress_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"stress_avg","majorFontSize":72,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showLabel":false,"trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('stresscolor') | lastPoint()"},"title":"Stress (avg)","hideWhenNoData":true},"garmin_vo2_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_garmin_vo2_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"vo2max","majorFontSize":72,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showLabel":false,"trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left","unit":"ml/kg/min","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"VO2 Max","hideWhenNoData":true},"garmin_fitage_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_garmin_fitage_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"fitness_age","majorFontSize":72,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showLabel":false,"trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left","unit":"yrs","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"Fitness Age","hideWhenNoData":true},"garmin_trend_line":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_garmin_trend"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom"},"title":"Body Battery & Stress — 30 days","hideWhenNoData":true},"garmin_empty_msg":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_garmin_absent"},"options":{"majorField":"msg","majorFontSize":22,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","sparklineDisplay":"off","trendDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"Garmin metrics — Body Battery, Stress, VO2 Max, Fitness Age & body composition appear here once a Garmin device syncs.","hideWhenNoData":true},"oura_empty_vitals":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_oura_absent"},"options":{"majorField":"msg","majorFontSize":22,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","sparklineDisplay":"off","trendDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"Oura vitals — SpO2, skin temperature & HRV balance appear here once an Oura ring syncs.","hideWhenNoData":true},"oura_empty_recovery":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_oura_absent"},"options":{"majorField":"msg","majorFontSize":22,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","sparklineDisplay":"off","trendDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"Oura recovery — Readiness & Resilience appear here once an Oura ring syncs.","hideWhenNoData":true},"bc_weight_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_bc_weight"},"options":{"majorField":"weight_disp","majorFontSize":72,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showLabel":false,"trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"Weight (latest)","hideWhenNoData":true},"bc_bmi_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_bc_bmi"},"options":{"majorField":"bmi","majorFontSize":72,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showLabel":false,"trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"BMI (latest)","hideWhenNoData":true},"bc_fat_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_bc_fat"},"options":{"majorField":"body_fat_pct","majorFontSize":72,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showLabel":false,"trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left","unit":"%","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"Body Fat (latest)","hideWhenNoData":true},"bc_source_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_bc_source"},"options":{"majorField":"src","majorFontSize":28,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showLabel":false,"trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"Source","hideWhenNoData":true},"bc_trend_line":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_bc_trend"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","nullValueDisplay":"connect","seriesColors":["#8C5EFF","#E8503A","#4CAF50"]},"title":"Weight trend (in your units) — Max / Min bands","hideWhenNoData":true},"bc_empty_msg":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_bc_absent"},"options":{"majorField":"msg","majorFontSize":22,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","sparklineDisplay":"off","trendDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"Body Composition — weight, BMI & body-fat appear here from a Withings or Garmin scale (set height_cm in the person registry to compute BMI when the device doesn't).","hideWhenNoData":true},"bc_bf_bmi_line":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_bc_bf_bmi"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","nullValueDisplay":"connect"},"title":"Body Fat % & BMI trend","hideWhenNoData":true},"skin_temp_gauge":{"type":"splunk.markergauge","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_latest"},"options":{"value":"> primary | seriesByName('temp_deviation') | lastPoint()","orientation":"vertical","valueDisplay":"number","labelDisplay":"number","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","gaugeRanges":[{"from":-1.5,"to":-1.0,"value":"#4FC3F7"},{"from":-1.0,"to":-0.5,"value":"#4DD0E1"},{"from":-0.5,"to":0.5,"value":"#4CAF50"},{"from":0.5,"to":1.0,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":1.0,"to":1.5,"value":"#E8503A"}]},"title":"Skin Temp Deviation (°C)","hideWhenNoData":true},"temp_trend_gauge":{"type":"splunk.markergauge","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_latest"},"options":{"value":"> primary | seriesByName('temp_trend_deviation') | lastPoint()","orientation":"vertical","valueDisplay":"number","labelDisplay":"number","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","gaugeRanges":[{"from":-1.5,"to":-1.0,"value":"#4FC3F7"},{"from":-1.0,"to":-0.5,"value":"#4DD0E1"},{"from":-0.5,"to":0.5,"value":"#4CAF50"},{"from":0.5,"to":1.0,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":1.0,"to":1.5,"value":"#E8503A"}]},"title":"Temp Trend (°C)","hideWhenNoData":true}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp","input_person","input_units"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"Vitals —
